images/endo/palopegteriparatide.png.title: Palopegteriparatide — The Paleo-Park Skydive

First-in-class once-daily subcutaneous PTH(1-34) replacement for hypoparathyroidism; a pegylated prodrug giving 24-hour sustained PTH release.

ANCHORS:

- Pal-Peg-Ptero-Parachute taking flight = **Pegylated prodrug of PTH 1-34 (teriparatide; transient linker attaches PEG to temporarily inactivate it at injection site)**
- Syringe Submarine docking with the harness = **Subcutaneous (SC) injection, once daily (prefilled pen device)**
- Full-Day Clock (24) slowly and continuously unwinding = **24-hour sustained release of active PTH (transient linker cleaves progressively; distinguishes from short-acting native PTH bolus)**

- Aching Skeleton tourist gripping cracking knee joints = **Arthralgia / joint pain (commonly reported AE)**

- Pungent Cleaning Spray (bleach/perfume) = **Irritant Rhinitis (strong odors, chemicals, smoke -> direct mucosal irritation)**

images/endo/secondary-causes-of-osteopor.title: Secondary Causes of Osteoporosis — The Brittle Bone

- Locked Wheat Catering Truck = **Malabsorption (celiac disease, Crohn's, gastric bypass -> impaired Ca2+ and Vitamin D absorption)**
- Broken Mars and Venus statues missing core parts = **Hypogonadism (low estrogen in females, low testosterone in males)**

- Heavy Steel Pin dropped on Ostrich's foot = **Heparin (long-term use activates osteoclasts)**
- Proton Pumper superhero spraying green foam = **PPIs (reduce gastric acid -> impaired Ca2+ absorption)**
- Glamorous Actress pinching her nose at a bad aroma = **Aromatase Inhibitors (block estrogen synthesis -> rapid bone loss in breast cancer patients)**
- Spilled Alcohol bottle + heavy Smoke Machine = **Alcohol + Smoking (lifestyle risk factors)**

images/endo/fgf-23.png.title: FGF-23 — The Bone-Building Gym

- Frog-23 = **FGF-23 (Fibroblast Growth Factor 23)**

images/endo/gip.png.title: GIP — The K-Cell Kitchen
